name: Catan
descriptionEN: Players take on the roles of settlers, each attempting to build and develop holdings while trading and acquiring resources.

name: Ticket to Ride
descriptionEN: Players collect cards of various types of train cars they then use to claim railway routes in North America.

name: Scythe
descriptionEN: An engine-building, asymmetric, competitive board game set in an alternate-history 1920s period.

name: Terraforming Mars
descriptionEN: Players control corporations and buy and play cards to terraform the planet Mars.

name: Azul
descriptionEN: Players take turns drafting colored tiles from suppliers to their player board to score points.

name: Gloomhaven
descriptionEN: A cooperative game of tactical combat in a unique, evolving fantasy world.

name: Carcassonne
descriptionEN: Players draw and place a tile with a piece of southern French landscape on it.

name: Pandemic
descriptionEN: Your team of experts must prevent the world from succumbing to a viral pandemic.

name: Wingspan
descriptionEN: Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.

name: Codenames
descriptionEN: Give your team clever one-word clues to help them spot their agents in the field.

name: 7 Wonders
descriptionEN: Draft cards to develop your ancient civilization and build its Wonder of the World.

name: Splendor
descriptionEN: Renaissance merchants race to grab gems, acquire property, and please nobility.

name: Root
descriptionEN: A game of woodland might and right, with highly asymmetric factions.

name: Everdell
descriptionEN: A game of dynamic tableau building and worker placement in a charming forest.

name: Brass: Birmingham
descriptionEN: Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.

name: The Castles of Burgundy
descriptionEN: Plan, trade, and build your Burgundian estate to prosperity and prominence.

name: Cascadia
descriptionEN: Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you draft habitats and wildlife.

name: Blood Rage
descriptionEN: Ragnarök has come! Draft cards, lead your Viking clan to glory, and die in battle.

name: Ark Nova
descriptionEN: Plan and design a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.

name: Spirit Island
descriptionEN: Island Spirits join forces to defend their home from colonizing Invaders.

name: Dune: Imperium
descriptionEN: Influence, intrigue, and combat in the universe of Dune using deck-building and worker placement.

name: Lost Ruins of Arnak
descriptionEN: Explore a mysterious island, discover artifacts, and face formidable guardians.

name: Dominion
descriptionEN: Acquire lands, hire subjects, and build the ultimate deck to rule your kingdom.

name: Twilight Imperium: Fourth Edition
descriptionEN: Build an empire through trade, politics, and warfare in a galaxy-spanning space opera.

name: Patchwork
descriptionEN: Compete to build the most aesthetic (and high-scoring) patchwork quilt.

name: King of Tokyo
descriptionEN: Mutant monsters, gigantic robots, and fierce aliens battle for control of Tokyo.

name: Puerto Rico
descriptionEN: Ship goods, construct buildings, and choose roles to become the most prosperous in Puerto Rico.
